{
  "contents": "<?php\n/**\n * Telegram Bot 管理后台 - \n */\n\n// 调试：标记 config.php 开始加载\nerror_log(\"[CONFIG] config.php loading started\");\n\n// 数据库配置\ndefine('DB_HOST', 'localhost');\ndefine('DB_NAME', 'jiqiren');\ndefine('DB_USER', 'jiqiren');\ndefine('DB_PASS', 'jiqiren');\ndefine('DB_CHARSET', 'utf8mb4');\n\n// 默认配置（如果数据库中没有设置则使用这些值）\ndefine('DEFAULT_BOT_TOKEN', '8389918907:AAEjA3ulGUkbEX9xOfxqD_oPrcH9zwxruCg');\ndefine('DEFAULT_BOT_USERNAME', 'tshanmenbot');\ndefine('DEFAULT_SITE_URL', 'https://3a33-144-48-80-235.ngrok-free.app');\n\n// Telegram User API 配置（用于真人账号登录）\n// 已配置您的 API 凭证\ndefine('TELEGRAM_API_ID', 37150745);\ndefine('TELEGRAM_API_HASH', 'bce833a3ffb3786ef923c4b5102655e0');\n\n// Session 配置\ndefine('SESSION_LIFETIME', 86400); // 24小时\n\n// 时区设置\ndate_default_timezone_set('Asia/Shanghai');\n\n// 错误报告 (生产环境请设置为 0)\nerror_reporting(E_ALL);\nini_set('display_errors', 1);\n\n// 数据库连接类\nclass Database {\n    private static $instance = null;\n    private $conn;\n    \n    private function __construct() {\n        try {\n            $dsn = \"mysql:host=\" . DB_HOST . \";dbname=\" . DB_NAME . \";charset=\" . DB_CHARSET;\n            $options = [\n                PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,\n                PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,\n                PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,\n            ];\n            $this->conn = new PDO($dsn, DB_USER, DB_PASS, $options);\n        } catch(PDOException $e) {\n            die(\"数据库连接失败: \" . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n    }\n    \n    public static function getInstance() {\n        if (self::$instance === null) {\n            self::$instance = new self();\n        }\n        return self::$instance;\n    }\n    \n    public function getConnection() {\n        return $this->conn;\n    }\n}\n\n// 辅助函数\nfunction getDB() {\n    return Database::getInstance()->getConnection();\n}\n\n/**\n * 从数据库获取系统配置\n * @param string $key 配置键名\n * @param mixed $default 默认值\n * @return mixed\n */\nfunction getSystemSetting($key, $default = null) {\n    static $settings_cache = null;\n    static $load_attempted = false;\n    \n    // 首次调用时尝试加载所有设置到缓存\n    if ($settings_cache === null && !$load_attempted) {\n        $load_attempted = true;\n        $settings_cache = [];\n        try {\n            // 直接创建数据库连接，避免使用可能 die 的 getDB()\n            $dsn = \"mysql:host=\" . DB_HOST . \";dbname=\" . DB_NAME . \";charset=\" . DB_CHARSET;\n            $pdo = new PDO($dsn, DB_USER, DB_PASS, [\n                PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,\n                PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,\n            ]);\n            \n            // 先检查表是否存在\n            $check = $pdo->query(\"SHOW TABLES LIKE 'system_settings'\");\n            if ($check->rowCount() > 0) {\n                $stmt = $pdo->query(\"SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM system_settings\");\n                while ($row = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) {\n                    $settings_cache[$row['setting_key']] = $row['setting_value'];\n                }\n            }\n        } catch (PDOException $e) {\n            error_log(\"[CONFIG] PDO Error loading system settings: \" . $e->getMessage());\n            $settings_cache = [];\n        } catch (Exception $e) {\n            error_log(\"[CONFIG] Failed to load system settings: \" . $e->getMessage());\n            $settings_cache = [];\n        } catch (Error $e) {\n            error_log(\"[CONFIG] Error loading system settings: \" . $e->getMessage());\n            $settings_cache = [];\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // 确保 settings_cache 是数组\n    if (!is_array($settings_cache)) {\n        $settings_cache = [];\n    }\n    \n    return isset($settings_cache[$key]) && $settings_cache[$key] !== '' ? $settings_cache[$key] : $default;\n}\n\n/**\n * 清除设置缓存（用于设置更新后）\n */\nfunction clearSettingsCache() {\n    // 通过重新获取来刷新缓存（在下次调用时）\n    // 这里我们通过设置一个标志来实现\n    global $_settings_cache_cleared;\n    $_settings_cache_cleared = true;\n}\n\n// 动态加载机器人配置（优先从数据库读取）\ndefine('BOT_TOKEN', getSystemSetting('bot_token', DEFAULT_BOT_TOKEN));\ndefine('BOT_USERNAME', getSystemSetting('bot_username', DEFAULT_BOT_USERNAME));\ndefine('SITE_URL', getSystemSetting('site_url', DEFAULT_SITE_URL));\ndefine('WEBHOOK_URL', SITE_URL . '/bot/webhook.php');\n\n// 检查登录状态\nfunction checkLogin() {\n    session_start();\n    if (!isset($_SESSION['admin_id'])) {\n        header('Location: index.php');\n        exit;\n    }\n}\n\n// 输出JSON响应\nfunction jsonResponse($data, $status = 200) {\n    http_response_code($status);\n    header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');\n    echo json_encode($data, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);\n    exit;\n}\n\n// 日志配置\ndefine('LOG_PATH', __DIR__ . '/logs');\ndefine('ERROR_LOG', LOG_PATH . '/error.log');\ndefine('DEBUG_LOG', LOG_PATH . '/debug.log');\ndefine('ACCESS_LOG', LOG_PATH . '/access.log');\n\n// 确保日志目录存在\ntry {\n    if (!file_exists(LOG_PATH)) {\n        @mkdir(LOG_PATH, 0777, true);\n    }\n} catch (Exception $e) {\n    // 忽略错误，不阻塞加载\n    error_log(\"Warning: Failed to create log directory: \" . $e->getMessage());\n}\n\n// 设置错误日志\nini_set('log_errors', 1);\nini_set('error_log', ERROR_LOG);\n\n// 记录系统日志\nfunction logSystem($level, $message, $context = null) {\n    try {\n        // 记录到数据库\n        $db = getDB();\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT INTO system_logs (level, message, context) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\");\n        $stmt->execute([$level, $message, json_encode($context, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)]);\n        \n        // 同时记录到文件\n        $log_message = date('Y-m-d H:i:s') . \" [$level] $message\";\n        if ($context) {\n            $log_message .= \" Context: \" . json_encode($context, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);\n        }\n        \n        // 根据级别写入不同的日志文件\n        switch ($level) {\n            case 'error':\n                error_log($log_message . \"\\n\", 3, ERROR_LOG);\n                break;\n            case 'info':\n                error_log($log_message . \"\\n\", 3, DEBUG_LOG);\n                break;\n            default:\n                error_log($log_message . \"\\n\", 3, ACCESS_LOG);\n        }\n    } catch(Exception $e) {\n        error_log(\"Log system error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n    }\n}\n\n// XSS 防护\nfunction escape($string) {\n    return htmlspecialchars($string, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');\n}\n\n// 调试：标记 config.php 加载完成\nerror_log(\"[CONFIG] config.php loading completed successfully\");\n\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 213
}

DB_HOST . \";dbname=\" . DB_NAME . \";charset=\" . DB_CHARSET;\n            $options = [\n                PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,\n                PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,\n                PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,\n            ];\n            $this->conn = new PDO($dsn, DB_USER, DB_PASS, $options);\n        } catch(PDOException $e) {\n            die(\"数据库连接失败: \" . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n    }\n    \n    public static function getInstance() {\n        if (self::$instance === null) {\n            self::$instance = new self();\n        }\n        return self::$instance;\n    }\n    \n    public function getConnection() {\n        return $this->conn;\n    }\n}\n\n// 辅助函数\nfunction getDB() {\n    return Database::getInstance()->getConnection();\n}\n\n/**\n * 从数据库获取系统配置\n * @param string $key 配置键名\n * @param mixed $default 默认值\n * @return mixed\n */\nfunction getSystemSetting($key, $default = null) {\n    static $settings_cache = null;\n    static $load_attempted = false;\n    \n    // 首次调用时尝试加载所有设置到缓存\n    if ($settings_cache === null && !$load_attempted) {\n        $load_attempted = true;\n        $settings_cache = [];\n        try {\n            // 直接创建数据库连接，避免使用可能 die 的 getDB()\n            $dsn = \"mysql:host=\" . DB_HOST . \";dbname=\" . DB_NAME . \";charset=\" . DB_CHARSET;\n            $pdo = new PDO($dsn, DB_USER, DB_PASS, [\n                PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,\n                PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,\n            ]);\n            \n            // 先检查表是否存在\n            $check = $pdo->query(\"SHOW TABLES LIKE 'system_settings'\");\n            if ($check->rowCount() > 0) {\n                $stmt = $pdo->query(\"SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM system_settings\");\n                while ($row = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) {\n                    $settings_cache[$row['setting_key']] = $row['setting_value'];\n                }\n            }\n        } catch (PDOException $e) {\n            error_log(\"[CONFIG] PDO Error loading system settings: \" . $e->getMessage());\n            $settings_cache = [];\n        } catch (Exception $e) {\n            error_log(\"[CONFIG] Failed to load system settings: \" . $e->getMessage());\n            $settings_cache = [];\n        } catch (Error $e) {\n            error_log(\"[CONFIG] Error loading system settings: \" . $e->getMessage());\n            $settings_cache = [];\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // 确保 settings_cache 是数组\n    if (!is_array($settings_cache)) {\n        $settings_cache = [];\n    }\n    \n    return isset($settings_cache[$key]) && $settings_cache[$key] !== '' ? $settings_cache[$key] : $default;\n}\n\n/**\n * 清除设置缓存（用于设置更新后）\n */\nfunction clearSettingsCache() {\n    // 通过重新获取来刷新缓存（在下次调用时）\n    // 这里我们通过设置一个标志来实现\n    global $_settings_cache_cleared;\n    $_settings_cache_cleared = true;\n}\n\n// 动态加载机器人配置（优先从数据库读取）\ndefine('BOT_TOKEN', getSystemSetting('bot_token', DEFAULT_BOT_TOKEN));\ndefine('BOT_USERNAME', getSystemSetting('bot_username', DEFAULT_BOT_USERNAME));\ndefine('SITE_URL', getSystemSetting('site_url', DEFAULT_SITE_URL));\ndefine('WEBHOOK_URL', SITE_URL . '/bot/webhook.php');\n\n// 检查登录状态\nfunction checkLogin() {\n    session_start();\n    if (!isset($_SESSION['admin_id'])) {\n        header('Location: index.php');\n        exit;\n    }\n}\n\n// 输出JSON响应\nfunction jsonResponse($data, $status = 200) {\n    http_response_code($status);\n    header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');\n    echo json_encode($data, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);\n    exit;\n}\n\n// 日志配置\ndefine('LOG_PATH', __DIR__ . '/logs');\ndefine('ERROR_LOG', LOG_PATH . '/error.log');\ndefine('DEBUG_LOG', LOG_PATH . '/debug.log');\ndefine('ACCESS_LOG', LOG_PATH . '/access.log');\n\n// 确保日志目录存在\ntry {\n    if (!file_exists(LOG_PATH)) {\n        @mkdir(LOG_PATH, 0777, true);\n    }\n} catch (Exception $e) {\n    // 忽略错误，不阻塞加载\n    error_log(\"Warning: Failed to create log directory: \" . $e->getMessage());\n}\n\n// 设置错误日志\nini_set('log_errors', 1);\nini_set('error_log', ERROR_LOG);\n\n// 记录系统日志\nfunction logSystem($level, $message, $context = null) {\n    try {\n        // 记录到数据库\n        $db = getDB();\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT INTO system_logs (level, message, context) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\");\n        $stmt->execute([$level, $message, json_encode($context, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)]);\n        \n        // 同时记录到文件\n        $log_message = date('Y-m-d H:i:s') . \" [$level] $message\";\n        if ($context) {\n            $log_message .= \" Context: \" . json_encode($context, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);\n        }\n        \n        // 根据级别写入不同的日志文件\n        switch ($level) {\n            case 'error':\n                error_log($log_message . \"\\n\", 3, ERROR_LOG);\n                break;\n            case 'info':\n                error_log($log_message . \"\\n\", 3, DEBUG_LOG);\n                break;\n            default:\n                error_log($log_message . \"\\n\", 3, ACCESS_LOG);\n        }\n    } catch(Exception $e) {\n        error_log(\"Log system error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n    }\n}\n\n// XSS 防护\nfunction escape($string) {\n    return htmlspecialchars($string, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');\n}\n\n// 调试：标记 config.php 加载完成\nerror_log(\"[CONFIG] config.php loading completed successfully\");\n\n",

'/../logs/user_account_debug.log';\nfunction userAccountLog($message) {\n    global $debug_log_file;\n    $timestamp = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');\n    file_put_contents($debug_log_file, \"[$timestamp] $message\\n\", FILE_APPEND);\n}\n\n// 捕获所有错误到日志\nset_error_handler(function($errno, $errstr, $errfile, $errline) {\n    error_log(\"PHP Error [$errno]: $errstr in $errfile on line $errline\");\n    userAccountLog(\"PHP Error [$errno]: $errstr in $errfile on line $errline\");\n    return true;\n});\n\nrequire_once '../config.php';\nrequire_once '../vendor/autoload.php';\n\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\API;\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\Settings;\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\Logger;\n\ntry {\n    userAccountLog(\"=== API 请求开始 ===\");\n    userAccountLog(\"请求方法: \" . $_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD']);\n    userAccountLog(\"请求URI: \" . ($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'] ?? 'unknown'));\n    \n    checkLogin();\n    userAccountLog(\"✓ 登录检查通过\");\n\n    $db = getDB();\n    userAccountLog(\"✓ 数据库连接成功\");\n\n    // Session 文件目录\n    $session_dir = __DIR__ . '/../sessions/';\n    if (!is_dir($session_dir)) {\n        mkdir($session_dir, 0700, true);\n        userAccountLog(\"✓ 创建 sessions 目录\");\n    }\n    userAccountLog(\"Session 目录: \" . $session_dir);\n\n    // 清空输出缓冲\n    ob_clean();\n\n    // POST 请求\n    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] == 'POST') {\n        $raw_input = file_get_contents('php://input');\n        userAccountLog(\"接收到 POST 数据长度: \" . strlen($raw_input));\n        \n        $data = json_decode($raw_input, true);\n        userAccountLog(\"JSON 解析结果: \" . ($data ? '成功' : '失败'));\n        \n        $action = $data['action'] ?? '';\n        userAccountLog(\"请求 Action: \" . $action);\n    \n    switch ($action) {\n        case 'send_code':\n            userAccountLog(\"--- 开始处理 send_code ---\");",

{
  "contents": "    // 获取群组ID\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id FROM `groups` WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n    $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n    $group = $stmt->fetch();\n    \n    // 添加到黑名单\n    $result = addToBlacklist(\n        $db,\n        $targetUserId,\n        $targetUsername,\n        $targetFirstName,\n        $targetLastName,\n        $reason,\n        null, // 全局黑名单\n        $user['first_name'] ?? 'Admin',\n        $user['id'],\n        1\n    );\n    \n    if ($result) {\n        // 踢出用户\n        kickBlacklistedUser($bot, $db, $chat_id, $targetUserId, $reason, false);\n        \n        $name = trim(\"$targetFirstName $targetLastName\");\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"✅ 已将用户 $name (ID: $targetUserId) 加入黑名单并踢出\\n原因: $reason\");\n    } else {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"❌ 操作失败，请重试\");\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 处理 /unban 命令\n */\nfunction handleUnbanCommand($bot, $db, $chat_id, $message, $user) {\n    // 检查用户是否是管理员\n    $member = $bot->getChatMember($chat_id, $user['id']);\n    if (!$member || !in_array($member['status'], ['creator', 'administrator'])) {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"⚠️ 只有管理员可以使用此命令\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 获取要解封的用户ID\n    $text = $message['text'] ?? '';\n    $parts = explode(' ', $text);\n    \n    $targetUserId = null;\n    \n    // 如果回复了消息\n    if (isset($message['reply_to_message'])) {\n        $targetUserId = $message['reply_to_message']['from']['id'];\n    } elseif (isset($parts[1])) {\n        $targetUserId = intval($parts[1]);\n    }\n    \n    if (!$targetUserId) {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"⚠️ 请提供要解封的用户ID\\n\\n用法：\\n/unban 用户ID\\n或回复用户消息并发送 /unban\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 从黑名单移除\n    $result = removeFromBlacklist($db, $targetUserId);\n    \n    if ($result) {\n        // 解除群组封禁\n        $bot->unbanChatMember($chat_id, $targetUserId);\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"✅ 已将用户 (ID: $targetUserId) 从黑名单移除\");\n    } else {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"❌ 操作失败，请重试\");\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 处理 /blacklist 命令 - 查看黑名单\n */\nfunction handleBlacklistCommand($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user) {\n    // 检查用户是否是管理员\n    $member = $bot->getChatMember($chat_id, $user['id']);\n    if (!$member || !in_array($member['status'], ['creator', 'administrator'])) {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"⚠️ 只有管理员可以使用此命令\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 获取黑名单\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT * FROM blacklist WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20\");\n    $stmt->execute();\n    $blacklist = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);\n    \n    if (empty($blacklist)) {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"📋 黑名单为空\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    $message = \"📋 **黑名单列表** (最近20条)\\n\\n\";\n    foreach ($blacklist as $item) {\n        $name = trim(($item['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($item['last_name'] ?? ''));\n        if ($item['username']) {\n            $name .= \" (@{$item['username']})\";\n        }\n        $message .= \"• ID: `{$item['user_id']}`\\n\";\n        $message .= \"  名称: {$name}\\n\";\n        if ($item['reason']) {\n            $message .= \"  原因: {$item['reason']}\\n\";\n        }\n        $message .= \"\\n\";\n    }\n    \n    $message .= \"💡 使用 /unban 用户ID 可解除封禁\";\n    \n    $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, $message, 'Markdown');\n}",

}

'@' . $result['username'] : '', $message);\n        \n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, $message);\n        error_log(\"Name change notification sent for user {$result['user_id']}\");\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 处理 /ban 命令\n */\nfunction handleBanCommand($bot, $db, $chat_id, $message, $user) {\n    // 检查用户是否是管理员\n    $member = $bot->getChatMember($chat_id, $user['id']);\n    if (!$member || !in_array($member['status'], ['creator', 'administrator'])) {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"⚠️ 只有管理员可以使用此命令\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查是否回复了某条消息\n    if (!isset($message['reply_to_message'])) {\n        $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"⚠️ 请回复要封禁的用户的消息来使用此命令\\n\\n用法：回复用户消息并发送 /ban [原因]\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    $targetUser = $message['reply_to_message']['from'];\n    $targetUserId = $targetUser['id'];\n    $targetUsername = $targetUser['username'] ?? null;\n    $targetFirstName = $targetUser['first_name'] ??   "contents": "<?php\n/**\n * 黑名单和改名监控处理器\n */\n\n/**\n * 确保必要的数据库表存在\n */\nfunction ensureBlacklistTablesExist($db) {\n    try {\n        // 创建黑名单表\n        $db->exec(\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blacklist (\n                id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n                user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\n                username VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\n                first_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\n                last_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\n                reason VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,\n                group_id INT DEFAULT NULL,\n                added_by VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\n                added_by_user_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL,\n                is_active TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,\n                kick_inviter TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n                INDEX idx_is_active (is_active)\n            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4\n        \");\n        \n        // 创建用户名历史表\n        $db->exec(\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_name_history (\n                id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n                user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\n                username VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\n                first_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\n                last_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\n                recorded_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                INDEX idx_user_id (user_id)\n            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4\n        \");\n        \n        // 创建黑名单设置表\n        $db->exec(\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blacklist_settings (\n                id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n                setting_key VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\n                setting_value TEXT DEFAULT NULL,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                UNIQUE KEY uk_setting_key (setting_key)\n            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4\n        \");\n        \n        // 插入默认设置\n        $defaultSettings = [\n            'enable_blacklist' => '1',\n            'enable_name_monitor' => '1',\n            'kick_inviter' => '1',\n            'notify_in_group' => '1',\n            'name_change_message' => '⚠️ 提醒：用户 {old_name} 已改名为 {new_name}，别以为改了名字我就不认识你了！(ID: {user_id})'\n        ];\n        \n        foreach ($defaultSettings as $key => $value) {\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT IGNORE INTO blacklist_settings (setting_key, setting_value) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n            $stmt->execute([$key, $value]);\n        }\n        \n    } catch (Exception $e) {\n        error_log(\"ensureBlacklistTablesExist error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取黑名单设置\n */\nfunction getBlacklistSettings($db) {\n    try {\n        $stmt = $db->query(\"SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM blacklist_settings\");\n        $settings = [];\n        while ($row = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) {\n            $settings[$row['setting_key']] = $row['setting_value'];\n        }\n        return $settings;\n    } catch (Exception $e) {\n        error_log(\"getBlacklistSettings error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n        return [\n            'enable_blacklist' => '1',\n            'enable_name_monitor' => '1',\n            'kick_inviter' => '1',\n            'notify_in_group' => '1',\n            'name_change_message' => ''\n        ];\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 检查用户是否在黑名单中",

}

{
  "contents": " * 检查用户是否在黑名单中\n */\nfunction isUserInBlacklist($db, $user_id, $group_id = null) {\n    try {\n        // 检查全局黑名单和特定群组黑名单\n        if ($group_id) {\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"\n                SELECT * FROM blacklist \n                WHERE user_id = ? AND is_active = 1 \n                AND (group_id IS NULL OR group_id = ?)\n                LIMIT 1\n            \");\n            $stmt->execute([$user_id, $group_id]);\n        } else {\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"\n                SELECT * FROM blacklist \n                WHERE user_id = ? AND is_active = 1 AND group_id IS NULL\n                LIMIT 1\n            \");\n            $stmt->execute([$user_id]);\n        }\n        return $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);\n    } catch (Exception $e) {\n        error_log(\"isUserInBlacklist error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n        return false;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 添加用户到黑名单\n */\nfunction addToBlacklist($db, $user_id, $username = null, $first_name = null, $last_name = null, $reason = null, $group_id = null, $added_by = null, $added_by_user_id = null, $kick_inviter = 1) {\n    try {\n        // 检查是否已存在\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id FROM blacklist WHERE user_id = ? AND is_active = 1 AND (group_id IS NULL OR group_id = ?)\");\n        $stmt->execute([$user_id, $group_id]);\n        if ($stmt->fetch()) {\n            return true; // 已存在\n        }\n        \n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"\n            INSERT INTO blacklist (user_id, username, first_name, last_name, reason, group_id, added_by, added_by_user_id, kick_inviter, is_active)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1)\n        \");\n        $stmt->execute([\n            $user_id,\n            $username,\n            $first_name,\n            $last_name,\n            $reason,\n            $group_id,\n            $added_by,\n            $added_by_user_id,\n            $kick_inviter\n        ]);\n        \n        error_log(\"User $user_id added to blacklist\");\n        return true;\n    } catch (Exception $e) {\n        error_log(\"addToBlacklist error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n        return false;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 从黑名单移除用户\n */\nfunction removeFromBlacklist($db, $user_id) {\n    try {\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE blacklist SET is_active = 0 WHERE user_id = ?\");\n        $stmt->execute([$user_id]);\n        error_log(\"User $user_id removed from blacklist\");\n        return true;\n    } catch (Exception $e) {\n        error_log(\"removeFromBlacklist error: \" . $e->getMessage());\n        return false;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 后台/API 加入黑名单后，从机器人已记录的群组中立即踢出该用户，并对邀请者执行连坐\n *\n * @param int|null $group_db_id 若指定则只踢该群；null 表示所有已启用群\n * @return int 成功踢出次数（单次失败不影响其他群）\n */\nfunction kickBlacklistedUserFromAllManagedGroups($bot, $db, $user_id, $group_db_id = null, $notify = false) {\n    $user_id = (int) $user_id;\n    $kicked = 0;\n    try {\n        $settings = getBlacklistSettings($db);\n        $globalKickInviter = $settings['kick_inviter'] === '1';\n\n        // 获取黑名单条目，检查该条目的 kick_inviter 标志\n        $blStmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT kick_inviter FROM blacklist WHERE user_id = ? AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1\");\n        $blStmt->execute([$user_id]);\n        $blEntry = $blStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);\n        $entryKickInviter = $blEntry ? (int) $blEntry['kick_inviter'] : 1;\n        $shouldKickInviter = $globalKickInviter && $entryKickInviter === 1;\n\n        if ($group_db_id !== null && $group_db_id !== '') {\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id, chat_id FROM `groups` WHERE id = ? AND is_active = 1\");\n            $stmt->execute([(int) $group_db_id]);\n            $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);\n        } else {\n            $stmt = $db->query(\"SELECT id, chat_id FROM `groups` WHERE is_active = 1\");\n            $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);\n        }\n\n        // 第一遍：踢出黑名单用户，顺带收集各群的邀请者\n        $invitersToKick = []; // [inviter_id => inviter_username]\n\n        foreach ($rows as $row) {\n            $chat_id = $row['chat_id'];\n            $grp_id  = $row['id'];\n\n            if (kickBlacklistedUser($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user_id, null, $notify)) {\n                $kicked++;\n            }\n\n            // 连坐：查询该群中邀请此用户进来的人，只收集，不在此处踢\n            if ($shouldKickInviter) {\n                try {\n                    $invStmt = $db->prepare(\"\n                        SELECT invited_by_user_id, invited_by_username\n                        FROM group_members\n                        WHERE group_id = ? AND user_id = ?\n                          AND invited_by_user_id IS NOT NULL\n                        LIMIT 1\n                    \");\n                    $invStmt->execute([$grp_id, $user_id]);\n                    $invRow = $invStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);\n\n                    if ($invRow && (int) $invRow['invited_by_user_id'] !== $user_id) {\n                        $inv_id = (int) $invRow['invited_by_user_id'];\n                        if (!isset($invitersToKick[$inv_id])) {\n                            $invitersToKick[$inv_id] = $invRow['invited_by_username'] ?? null;\n                        }\n                    }\n                } catch (Exception $ei) {\n                    error_log(\"kickBlacklistedUserFromAllManagedGroups inviter collect error: \" . $ei->getMessage());\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        error_log(\"kickBlacklistedUserFromAllManagedGroups: user $user_id kicked in $kicked chat(s)\");\n\n        // 第二遍：对收集到的邀请者，按相同群范围全部踢出（范围与黑名单用户保持一致）\n        foreach ($invitersToKick as $inviter_id => $inviter_username) {\n            // 将邀请者加入全局黑名单\n            addToBlacklist(",
  "totalLinesInFile": 670
}

($result ? 'success' : 'failed') . \", delete_after: \" . $delete_after);\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// 发送欢迎消息\nfunction sendWelcomeMessage($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user, $join_message_id = null) {\n    error_log(\"Sending welcome message for chat: $chat_id\");\n    logSystem('info', '准备发送欢迎消息', [\n        'chat_id' => $chat_id,\n        'user' => $user\n    ]);\n\n    // 先获取群组ID\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id FROM groups WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n    $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n    $group = $stmt->fetch();\n\n    if (!$group) {\n        error_log(\"Group not found for welcome message\");\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 获取欢迎消息设置\n    // 优先查找该群组特定的欢迎消息，如果没有则使用\"所有群组\"的欢迎消息\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"\n        SELECT wm.* FROM welcome_messages wm \n        WHERE (wm.group_id = ? OR wm.group_id IS NULL) \n        AND wm.is_active = 1 \n        ORDER BY wm.group_id DESC \n        LIMIT 1\n    \");\n    $stmt->execute([$group['id']]);\n    $welcome = $stmt->fetch();\n\n    error_log(\"Welcome message found: \" . ($welcome ? 'yes' : 'no'));\n    \n    if ($welcome) {\n        $name = $user['first_name'] ?? 'New Member';\n        $message = str_replace('{name}', $name, $welcome['message']);\n        $message = str_replace('{username}', '@' . ($user['username'] ?? $name), $message);\n        \n        // Parse buttons if available - 支持新格式（每行多按钮+二级菜单）\n        $replyMarkup = buildAdInlineKeyboard($welcome['buttons'] ?? null, $welcome['id'] ?? null);\n        \n        error_log(\"Sending welcome message: $message\");\n        \n        // 获取自毁时间\n        $delete_after = isset($welcome['delete_after_seconds']) ? intval($welcome['delete_after_seconds']) : 0;\n        \n        // Send message with image or text\n        if (!empty($welcome['image_url'])) {\n            // Build full URL for image\n            $imageUrl = $welcome['image_url'];\n            if (!preg_match('/^https?:\\/\\//', $imageUrl)) {\n                $imageUrl = SITE_URL . '/' . ltrim($imageUrl, '/');\n            }\n            \n            $result = $bot->sendPhoto($chat_id, $imageUrl, $message, $replyMarkup, 'HTML', $delete_after);\n        } else {\n            $result = $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, $message, 'HTML', $replyMarkup, $delete_after);\n        }\n        \n        // 如果设置了自毁时间，创建定时任务删除消息\n        if ($result && $delete_after > 0 && isset($result['message_id'])) {\n            scheduleMessageDeletion($db, $chat_id, $result['message_id'], $delete_after);\n            \n            // 同时删除加入消息\n            if ($join_message_id) {\n                scheduleMessageDeletion($db, $chat_id, $join_message_id, $delete_after);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        logSystem('info', '欢迎消息发送结果', [\n            'success' => $result ? true : false,\n            'message' => $message,\n            'had_image' => !empty($welcome['image_url']),\n            'had_buttons' => !empty($replyMarkup),\n            'delete_after' => $delete_after\n        ]);\n    } else {\n        error_log(\"No active welcome message found for group\");\n    }\n}\n\n// 处理新成员验证\nfunction handleNewMemberVerification($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user, $verification, $join_message_id) {\n    error_log(\"Starting verification for user: \" . $user['id']);\n    \n    $user_id = $user['id'];\n    $name = $user['first_name'] ?? 'New Member';",

'/' . ltrim($imageUrl, '/');\n            }\n            \n            $result = $bot->sendPhoto($chat_id, $imageUrl, $message, $replyMarkup, 'HTML', $delete_after);\n        } else {\n            $result = $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, $message, 'HTML', $replyMarkup, $delete_after);\n        }\n        \n        // 如果设置了自毁时间，创建定时任务删除消息\n        if ($result && $delete_after > 0 && isset($result['message_id'])) {\n            scheduleMessageDeletion($db, $chat_id, $result['message_id'], $delete_after);\n            \n            // 同时删除加入消息\n            if ($join_message_id) {\n                scheduleMessageDeletion($db, $chat_id, $join_message_id, $delete_after);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        logSystem('info', '欢迎消息发送结果', [\n            'success' => $result ? true : false,\n            'message' => $message,\n            'had_image' => !empty($welcome['image_url']),\n            'had_buttons' => !empty($replyMarkup),\n            'delete_after' => $delete_after\n        ]);\n    } else {\n        error_log(\"No active welcome message found for group\");\n    }\n}\n\n// 处理新成员验证\nfunction handleNewMemberVerification($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user, $verification, $join_message_id) {\n    error_log(\"Starting verification for user: \" . $user['id']);\n    \n    $user_id = $user['id'];\n    $name = $user['first_name'] ?? 'New Member';",
  "totalLinesInFile": 5146
}

  "contents": "                $matched = substr_compare($text, $banned['word'], -strlen($banned['word']), strlen($banned['word']), true) === 0;\n                break;\n            case 'regex':\n                $matched = @preg_match('/' . $banned['word'] . '/iu', $text);\n                break;\n            default:\n                $matched = false;\n        }\n        \n        if ($matched) {\n            // 删除消息\n            $bot->deleteMessage($chat_id, $message_id);\n            \n            // 执行所有选中的操作\n            if ($banned['delete_message']) {\n                $bot->deleteMessage($chat_id, $message_id);\n            }\n            \n            if ($banned['warn_user']) {\n                $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"⚠️ Warning: Prohibited content detected!\");\n            }\n            \n            if ($banned['kick_user']) {\n                $bot->kickChatMember($chat_id, $user_id);\n                $bot->unbanChatMember($chat_id, $user_id); // 允许用户再次加入\n            }\n            \n            if ($banned['ban_user']) {\n                $bot->kickChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, 0); // 永久封禁\n            }\n            \n            // 记录违规\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id FROM groups WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n            $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n            $group = $stmt->fetch();\n            \n            if ($group) {\n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT INTO violation_logs (group_id, user_id, violation_type, message, action_taken) VALUES (?, ?, 'banned_word', ?, ?)\");\n                $stmt->execute([$group['id'], $user_id, $text, $banned['action']]);\n                \n                updateStatistics($db, $chat_id, 'violation');\n            }\n            \n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return false;\n}\n\n// 防洪水检测\nfunction checkAntiFlood($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user_id, $message_id) {\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT af.* FROM antiflood_settings af JOIN groups g ON af.group_id = g.id WHERE g.chat_id = ? AND af.is_active = 1\");\n    $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n    $settings = $stmt->fetch();\n    \n    if (!$settings) {\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查时间窗口内的消息数量\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM message_logs ml JOIN groups g ON ml.group_id = g.id WHERE g.chat_id = ? AND ml.user_id = ? AND ml.created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL ? SECOND)\");\n    $stmt->execute([$chat_id, $user_id, $settings['time_window']]);\n    $result = $stmt->fetch();\n    \n    if ($result['count'] > $settings['max_messages']) {\n        // 执行相应操作\n        switch ($settings['action']) {\n            case 'mute':\n                $bot->restrictChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, time() + $settings['mute_duration']);\n                $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"🔇 User muted for \" . ($settings['mute_duration'] / 60) . \" minutes (spamming)\");\n                break;\n            case 'kick':\n                $bot->kickChatMember($chat_id, $user_id);\n                break;\n            case 'ban':\n                $bot->kickChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, 0);\n                break;\n            case 'warn':\n                $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, \"⚠️ Warning: Please do not spam!\");",
  "totalLinesInFile": 5113
}

  "contents": "<?php\n/**\n * Telegram Bot Webhook 处理器\n * 接收并处理来自 Telegram 的更新\n */\n\n// 开启错误日志\nini_set('log_errors', 1);\nini_set('error_log', __DIR__ . '/debug.log');\nerror_reporting(E_ALL);\nini_set('display_errors', 0); // 不输出到屏幕，只记录到日志\n\n// 设置错误处理\nset_error_handler(function($errno, $errstr, $errfile, $errline) {\n    error_log(\"PHP Error [$errno]: $errstr in $errfile on line $errline\");\n    return false;\n});\n\nset_exception_handler(function($exception) {\n    error_log(\"PHP Exception: \" . $exception->getMessage());\n    error_log(\"Stack trace: \" . $exception->getTraceAsString());\n});\n\nregister_shutdown_function(function() {\n    $error = error_get_last();\n    if ($error !== null && in_array($error['type'], [E_ERROR, E_PARSE, E_CORE_ERROR, E_COMPILE_ERROR])) {\n        error_log(\"PHP Fatal Error: \" . print_r($error, true));\n    }\n});\n\n// 记录调试信息\nerror_log(\"Webhook debug - Time: \" . date('Y-m-d H:i:s'));\nerror_log(\"Request Method: \" . $_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD']);\nerror_log(\"Content-Type: \" . ($_SERVER['CONTENT_TYPE'] ?? 'not set'));\nerror_log(\"Content-Length: \" . ($_SERVER['CONTENT_LENGTH'] ?? 'not set'));\n\n// **关键：先读取输入数据，再加载其他文件**\n// 这样即使后续加载失败，我们也能看到请求内容\n$raw_input = @file_get_contents(\"php://input\");\nif ($raw_input !== false && !empty($raw_input)) {\n    @file_put_contents(__DIR__ . '/last_request.json', $raw_input);\n    error_log(\"Request saved to last_request.json, size: \" . strlen($raw_input));\n    error_log(\"Request preview: \" . substr($raw_input, 0, 200));\n}\n\nerror_log(\"HTTP Headers: \" . print_r(getallheaders(), true));\n\nerror_log(\"About to require config.php\");\nerror_log(\"Config path: \" . __DIR__ . '/../config.php');\nerror_log(\"File exists: \" . (file_exists(__DIR__ . '/../config.php') ? 'yes' : 'no'));\n\ntry {\n    error_log(\"[STEP 1] Starting to require config.php\");\n    require_once __DIR__ . '/../config.php';\n    \n    // 重新设置错误日志到 webhook 的 debug.log（因为 config.php 可能改变了它）\n    ini_set('error_log', __DIR__ . '/debug.log');\n    \n    error_log(\"[STEP 2] config.php require statement completed\");\n    \n    // 立即测试是否真的加载成功\n    if (defined('BOT_TOKEN')) {\n        error_log(\"[STEP 3] BOT_TOKEN is defined, config loaded successfully\");\n    } else {\n        error_log(\"[STEP 3] ERROR: BOT_TOKEN not defined after require\");\n    }\n    \n} catch (Exception $e) {\n    error_log(\"Failed to load config.php: \" . $e->getMessage());\n    error_log(\"Stack trace: \" . $e->getTraceAsString());\n    http_response_code(500);\n    exit;\n} catch (Error $e) {\n    error_log(\"Fatal error loading config.php: \" . $e->getMessage());\n    error_log(\"Stack trace: \" . $e->getTraceAsString());\n    http_response_code(500);\n    exit;\n}\n\nerror_log(\"About to require TelegramBot.php\");\nrequire_once 'TelegramBot.php';\nerror_log(\"TelegramBot.php loaded\");\n\nerror_log(\"About to require language_pack.php\");\nrequire_once '../includes/language_pack.php';\nerror_log(\"language_pack.php loaded\");\n\n// 加载黑名单处理器\nrequire_once 'blacklist_handler.php';\nerror_log(\"blacklist_handler.php loaded\");\n\n// 加载 Composer autoload（用于 MadelineProto）\nif (file_exists(__DIR__ . '/../vendor/autoload.php')) {\n    require_once __DIR__ . '/../vendor/autoload.php';\n}\n\n// MadelineProto 相关类（用于真人账号发送消息）\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\API;\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\Settings;\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\Logger;",

}

{
  "contents": "}\n\n// 处理回调查询\nfunction handleCallbackQuery($bot, $db, $callback_query) {\n    $callback_id = $callback_query['id'];\n    $data = $callback_query['data'] ?? '';\n    $user_id = $callback_query['from']['id'];\n    $message = $callback_query['message'] ?? null;\n    \n    if (!$message) {\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    $chat_id = $message['chat']['id'];\n    $message_id = $message['message_id'];\n    \n    // 处理导航栏按钮回调\n    if (strpos($data, 'nav_') === 0) {\n        handleNavigationCallback($bot, $db, $callback_id, $chat_id, $message_id, $data, $message);\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 处理验证回调\n    if (strpos($data, 'verify_') === 0) {\n        // 检查是否是频道订阅验证\n        $is_channel_verify = (strpos($data, 'verify_channel_') === 0);\n        \n        if ($is_channel_verify) {\n            // verify_channel_用户ID_频道用户名 或 verify_channel_用户ID_频道用户名_答案\n            $parts = explode('_', $data);\n            $target_user_id = isset($parts[2]) ? intval($parts[2]) : 0;\n            $channel_username = isset($parts[3]) ? $parts[3] : '';\n            $answer = isset($parts[4]) ? $parts[4] : null; // 可能有答案（数学题验证）\n        } else {\n            $parts = explode('_', $data);\n            $target_user_id = isset($parts[1]) ? intval($parts[1]) : 0;\n            $answer = isset($parts[2]) ? $parts[2] : null;\n            $channel_username = '';\n        }\n        \n        // 检查是否是本人点击\n        if ($user_id != $target_user_id) {\n            $bot->answerCallbackQuery($callback_id, '⚠️ This is not your verification!', true);\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // 如果是频道订阅验证，先检查是否已订阅\n        if ($is_channel_verify && $channel_username) {\n            $is_subscribed = checkChannelSubscription($bot, $channel_username, $user_id);\n            if (!$is_subscribed) {\n                $bot->answerCallbackQuery($callback_id, '⚠️ 请先订阅频道 @' . $channel_username . ' 后再点击验证！', true);\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        // 获取群组ID\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id FROM groups WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n        $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n        $group = $stmt->fetch();\n        \n        if (!$group) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // 获取验证记录\n        $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_verifications WHERE group_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\");\n        $stmt->execute([$group['id'], $user_id]);\n        $verification = $stmt->fetch();\n        \n        if (!$verification) {\n            $bot->answerCallbackQuery($callback_id, '❌ Verification record does not exist or has expired', true);\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // 检查是否超时\n        if (strtotime($verification['expires_at']) < time()) {\n            $bot->answerCallbackQuery($callback_id, '⏰ Verification has timed out', true);\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE pending_verifications SET status = 'expired' WHERE id = ?\");\n            $stmt->execute([$verification['id']]);\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // 验证答案\n        $is_correct = false;\n        if ($is_channel_verify && $verification['verification_code'] === null) {\n            // 频道订阅+按钮验证，频道已检查通过\n            $is_correct = true;\n        } elseif ($is_channel_verify && $verification['verification_code'] !== null) {\n            // 频道订阅+数学题验证，需要检查答案\n            $is_correct = ($answer === $verification['verification_code']);\n        } elseif ($verification['verification_code'] === null) {\n            // 简单按钮验证，直接通过\n            $is_correct = true;\n        } else {\n            // 需要检查答案（数学题验证）\n            $is_correct = ($answer === $verification['verification_code']);\n        }\n        \n        if ($is_correct) {\n            // 验证通过\n            $bot->answerCallbackQuery($callback_id, '✅ Verification successful! Welcome!');\n            \n            // 恢复用户权限\n            $bot->unrestrictChatMember($chat_id, $user_id);\n            \n            // 更新验证状态\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE pending_verifications SET status = 'verified' WHERE id = ?\");\n            $stmt->execute([$verification['id']]);\n            \n            // 删除验证消息\n            $bot->deleteMessage($chat_id, $message_id);\n            \n            // 删除加入消息\n            if ($verification['join_message_id']) {\n                $bot->deleteMessage($chat_id, $verification['join_message_id']);\n            }\n            \n            // 检查是否需要发送欢迎消息\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT * FROM verification_settings WHERE (group_id = ? OR group_id IS NULL) AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY group_id DESC LIMIT 1\");\n            $stmt->execute([$group['id']]);\n            $settings = $stmt->fetch();\n            \n            if ($settings && $settings['welcome_after_verify']) {\n                // 获取用户信息\n                $user = $callback_query['from'];\n                sendWelcomeMessage($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user);\n            }\n            \n            logSystem('info', '用户验证成功', ['user_id' => $user_id, 'chat_id' => $chat_id]);\n        } else {\n            // 验证失败\n            $bot->answerCallbackQuery($callback_id, '❌ Wrong answer, please try again', true);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// 创建消息删除定时任务\nfunction scheduleMessageDeletion($db, $chat_id, $message_id, $delay_seconds) {\n    try {\n        $scheduled_at = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() + $delay_seconds);",
  "totalLinesInFile": 5146
}

{
  "contents": "function handleNewMemberVerification($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user, $verification, $join_message_id) {\n    error_log(\"Starting verification for user: \" . $user['id']);\n    \n    $user_id = $user['id'];\n    $name = $user['first_name'] ?? 'New Member';\n    \n    // 先获取群组ID\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id FROM groups WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n    $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n    $group = $stmt->fetch();\n    \n    if (!$group) {\n        error_log(\"Group not found for verification\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 限制新成员权限（禁言）\n    $bot->restrictChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, null, false);\n    \n    // 生成验证消息和按钮\n    $verification_code = null;\n    $verification_message = $verification['verification_message'];\n    $keyboard = [];\n    \n    switch ($verification['verification_type']) {\n        case 'button':\n            // 简单按钮验证\n            if (!$verification_message) {\n                $verification_message = \"👋 Welcome {name}!\\n\\nPlease click the button below to complete verification before you can send messages.\\n⏰ Timeout: {timeout} seconds\";\n            }\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{name}', $name, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{timeout}', $verification['timeout_seconds'], $verification_message);\n            \n            $keyboard = [\n                [\n                    ['text' => '✅ I am not a robot', 'callback_data' => 'verify_' . $user_id]\n                ]\n            ];\n            break;\n            \n        case 'math':\n            // 数学题验证\n            $num1 = rand(1, 10);\n            $num2 = rand(1, 10);\n            $answer = $num1 + $num2;\n            $verification_code = strval($answer);\n            \n            if (!$verification_message) {\n                $verification_message = \"👋 Welcome {name}!\\n\\nPlease answer the following question to complete verification:\\n❓ {num1} + {num2} = ?\\n\\nPlease click the correct answer within {timeout} seconds:\";\n            }\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{name}', $name, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{num1}', $num1, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{num2}', $num2, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{timeout}', $verification['timeout_seconds'], $verification_message);\n            \n            // 生成答案按钮（包括错误答案）\n            $options = [$answer];\n            while (count($options) < 4) {\n                $wrong = rand($answer - 5, $answer + 5);\n                if (!in_array($wrong, $options) && $wrong > 0) {\n                    $options[] = $wrong;\n                }\n            }\n            shuffle($options);\n            \n            $button_row = [];\n            foreach ($options as $option) {\n                $button_row[] = ['text' => strval($option), 'callback_data' => 'verify_' . $user_id . '_' . $option];\n            }\n            $keyboard = [$button_row];\n            break;\n    }\n    \n    // 发送验证消息\n    $result = $bot->sendMessage($chat_id, $verification_message, 'HTML', ['inline_keyboard' => $keyboard]);\n    \n    if ($result && isset($result['message_id'])) {\n        $verification_message_id = $result['message_id'];\n        $expires_at = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() + $verification['timeout_seconds']);\n        \n        // 保存待验证记录\n        try {\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_verifications (group_id, user_id, verification_message_id, join_message_id, verification_code, expires_at, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'pending')\");\n            $stmt->execute([$group['id'], $user_id, $verification_message_id, $join_message_id, $verification_code, $expires_at]);\n            \n            // 创建定时任务，超时后踢出用户\n            scheduleVerificationTimeout($db, $chat_id, $user_id, $verification['timeout_seconds'], $verification['kick_on_fail']);\n            \n            logSystem('info', '验证消息已发送', [\n                'user_id' => $user_id,\n                'chat_id' => $chat_id,\n                'timeout' => $verification['timeout_seconds']\n            ]);\n        } catch (Exception $e) {\n            error_log(\"Failed to save verification record: \" . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// 处理回调查询",
  "totalLinesInFile": 5113
}

{
  "contents": "function handleNewMemberVerification($bot, $db, $chat_id, $user, $verification, $join_message_id) {\n    error_log(\"Starting verification for user: \" . $user['id']);\n    \n    $user_id = $user['id'];\n    $name = $user['first_name'] ?? 'New Member';\n    \n    // 先获取群组ID\n    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT id FROM groups WHERE chat_id = ?\");\n    $stmt->execute([$chat_id]);\n    $group = $stmt->fetch();\n    \n    if (!$group) {\n        error_log(\"Group not found for verification\");\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 限制新成员权限（禁言）\n    $bot->restrictChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, null, false);\n    \n    // 生成验证消息和按钮\n    $verification_code = null;\n    $verification_message = $verification['verification_message'];\n    $keyboard = [];\n    \n    // 检查是否需要频道订阅\n    $require_channel = $verification['require_channel'] ?? 0;\n    $required_channel = $verification['required_channel'] ?? '';\n    $channel_btn_text = $verification['channel_btn_text'] ?? '第一步 【请先订阅频道】🙋‍♀️';\n    $verify_btn_text = $verification['verify_btn_text'] ?? '第二步 【点击解除禁言】👍';\n    \n    // 处理频道用户名格式\n    $channel_username = '';\n    $channel_link = '';\n    if ($require_channel && $required_channel) {\n        // 提取频道用户名\n        if (strpos($required_channel, 't.me/') !== false) {\n            // 从链接中提取\n            preg_match('/t\\.me\\/([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)/', $required_channel, $matches);\n            $channel_username = $matches[1] ?? '';\n            $channel_link = 'https://t.me/' . $channel_username;\n        } elseif (strpos($required_channel, '@') === 0) {\n            // @username 格式\n            $channel_username = substr($required_channel, 1);\n            $channel_link = 'https://t.me/' . $channel_username;\n        } else {\n            // 纯用户名\n            $channel_username = $required_channel;\n            $channel_link = 'https://t.me/' . $channel_username;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    switch ($verification['verification_type']) {\n        case 'button':\n            // 简单按钮验证\n            if (!$verification_message) {\n                $verification_message = \"👋 Welcome {name}!\\n\\nPlease click the button below to complete verification before you can send messages.\\n⏰ Timeout: {timeout} seconds\";\n            }\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{name}', $name, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{timeout}', $verification['timeout_seconds'], $verification_message);\n            \n            // 如果需要频道订阅，显示两个按钮\n            if ($require_channel && $channel_username) {\n                $keyboard = [\n                    [\n                        ['text' => $channel_btn_text, 'url' => $channel_link]\n                    ],\n                    [\n                        ['text' => $verify_btn_text, 'callback_data' => 'verify_channel_' . $user_id . '_' . $channel_username]\n                    ]\n                ];\n            } else {\n                $keyboard = [\n                    [\n                        ['text' => '✅ I am not a robot', 'callback_data' => 'verify_' . $user_id]\n                    ]\n                ];\n            }\n            break;\n            \n        case 'math':\n            // 数学题验证\n            $num1 = rand(1, 10);\n            $num2 = rand(1, 10);\n            $answer = $num1 + $num2;\n            $verification_code = strval($answer);\n            \n            if (!$verification_message) {\n                $verification_message = \"👋 Welcome {name}!\\n\\nPlease answer the following question to complete verification:\\n❓ {num1} + {num2} = ?\\n\\nPlease click the correct answer within {timeout} seconds:\";\n            }\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{name}', $name, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{num1}', $num1, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{num2}', $num2, $verification_message);\n            $verification_message = str_replace('{timeout}', $verification['timeout_seconds'], $verification_message);\n            \n            // 生成答案按钮（包括错误答案）\n            $options = [$answer];\n            while (count($options) < 4) {\n                $wrong = rand($answer - 5, $answer + 5);\n                if (!in_array($wrong, $options) && $wrong > 0) {\n                    $options[] = $wrong;",

'';\n    \n    if ($action == 'get') {\n        $id = $_GET['id'] ?? 0;\n        \n        if (!$id) {\n            jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '无效的ID'], 400);\n        }\n        \n        try {\n            $stmt = $db->prepare(\"SELECT * FROM verification_settings WHERE id = ?\");\n            $stmt->execute([$id]);\n            $verification = $stmt->fetch();\n            \n            if (!$verification) {\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '验证设置不存在'], 404);\n            }\n            \n            jsonResponse(['success' => true, 'data' => $verification]);\n        } catch (Exception $e) {\n            logSystem('error', 'Fetch verification settings error', $e->getMessage());\n            jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '获取失败'], 500);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// POST 请求\nif ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] == 'POST') {\n    $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);\n    $action = $data['action'] ?? '';\n    \n    switch ($action) {\n        case 'add':\n            $group_id = $data['group_id'] ?? 0;\n            $verification_type = $data['verification_type'] ?? 'button';\n            $timeout_seconds = $data['timeout_seconds'] ?? 60;\n            $kick_on_fail = $data['kick_on_fail'] ?? 1;\n            $welcome_after_verify = $data['welcome_after_verify'] ?? 1;\n            $verification_message = $data['verification_message'] ?? null;\n            \n            if (empty($verification_type) || empty($timeout_seconds)) {\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '请填写所有必填字段'], 400);\n            }\n            \n            // Convert 0 to NULL for \"all groups\"\n            $final_group_id = ($group_id == 0) ? null : $group_id;\n            \n            try {\n                // 先禁用该群组的其他验证设置\n                if ($final_group_id === null) {\n                    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE verification_settings SET is_active = 0 WHERE group_id IS NULL\");\n                    $stmt->execute();\n                } else {\n                    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE verification_settings SET is_active = 0 WHERE group_id = ?\");\n                    $stmt->execute([$final_group_id]);\n                }\n                \n                // 添加新的验证设置\n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"INSERT INTO verification_settings (group_id, verification_type, timeout_seconds, kick_on_fail, welcome_after_verify, verification_message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\");\n                $stmt->execute([$final_group_id, $verification_type, $timeout_seconds, $kick_on_fail, $welcome_after_verify, $verification_message]);\n                \n                logSystem('info', 'Added verification settings', ['group_id' => $group_id]);\n                jsonResponse(['success' => true, 'message' => '添加成功']);\n            } catch (Exception $e) {\n                logSystem('error', 'Add verification settings error', $e->getMessage());\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '添加失败: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);\n            }\n            break;\n            \n        case 'update':\n            $id = $data['id'] ?? 0;\n            $group_id = $data['group_id'] ?? 0;\n            $verification_type = $data['verification_type'] ?? 'button';\n            $timeout_seconds = $data['timeout_seconds'] ?? 60;\n            $kick_on_fail = $data['kick_on_fail'] ?? 1;\n            $welcome_after_verify = $data['welcome_after_verify'] ?? 1;\n            $verification_message = $data['verification_message'] ?? null;\n            \n            if (!$id || empty($verification_type) || empty($timeout_seconds)) {\n                jsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => '请填写所有必填字段'], 400);\n            }\n            \n            // Convert 0 to NULL for \"all groups\"\n            $final_group_id = ($group_id == 0) ? null : $group_id;\n            \n            try {\n                // 先禁用该群组的其他验证设置\n                if ($final_group_id === null) {\n                    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE verification_settings SET is_active = 0 WHERE group_id IS NULL AND id != ?\");\n                    $stmt->execute([$id]);\n                } else {\n                    $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE verification_settings SET is_active = 0 WHERE group_id = ? AND id != ?\");\n                    $stmt->execute([$final_group_id, $id]);\n                }\n                \n                // 更新验证设置\n                $stmt = $db->prepare(\"UPDATE verification_settings SET group_id = ?, verification_type = ?, timeout_seconds = ?, kick_on_fail = ?, welcome_after_verify = ?, verification_message = ? ## 🤖 Assistant #148 (Agent)

_2026-04-22 10:02:11Z_

现在我已经完成了全面对比分析。让我整理结果。

---

## 两个项目对比分析报告

### 一、仅存在于旧项目（jiqiren.cryptoxthefuture.cc）的文件

| 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| `index.html` | 网站入口静态 HTML 页面 |
| `404.html` | 404 错误页面 |
| `.htaccess` | Apache 根目录配置文件 |

这三个文件在新项目中被删除了，说明新项目不再需要这些静态页面（可能改用 PHP 页面直接承接，或服务器配置不同）。

---

### 二、仅存在于新项目（niuniu.5088.buzz）的文件

| 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| `force_extract.php` | MadelineProto 工具脚本：遍历所有对话，批量下载所有媒体文件 |
| `extract_86_saved.php` | MadelineProto 工具脚本：专门提取 +86 账号收藏夹的内容（文字+媒体） |
| `view_saved.php` | 通过 MadelineProto 以网页形式查看账号收藏夹消息 |
| `test_php.php` | 调试脚本：检测服务器 PHP 可执行文件路径 |

这些都是**临时调试/数据迁移工具**，是在新服务器部署和调试过程中产生的。

---

### 三、内容发生变化的文件

#### 1. `config.php` — 部署配置不同

| 配置项 | 新项目（niuniu.5088.buzz） | 旧项目（jiqiren.cryptoxthefuture.cc） |
|--------|--------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| `DEFAULT_BOT_TOKEN` | `8389918907:AAEjA3...` | `8395268474:AAEwwu...` |
| `DEFAULT_BOT_USERNAME` | `tshanmenbot` | `qsggchbot` |
| `DEFAULT_SITE_URL` | `https://3a33-144-48-80-235.ngrok-free.app` | `https://jiqiren.cryptoxthefuture.cc` |
| `TELEGRAM_API_ID` | `37150745` | `24720403` |
| `TELEGRAM_API_HASH` | `bce833a3...` | `f0afbf37...` |

**原因：** 这是两个不同的部署环境，使用了不同的 Telegram Bot 账号和 API 凭证。新项目的 SITE_URL 是 ngrok 临时地址，说明处于**本地开发/测试阶段**。

---

#### 2. `bot/TelegramBot.php` — 新增 `banChatMember()` 方法（+8行）

**新项目新增了正式的 `banChatMember()` 方法**，并将 `kickChatMember()` 改为对其的封装：

旧项目（直接调用已弃用的 API）：
```php
public function kickChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, $until_date = null) {
    // 直接调用 kickChatMember（已弃用）
    return $this->apiRequest('kickChatMember', $parameters);
}
```

新项目（新增 `banChatMember` 并兼容旧调用）：
```php
// 新增：正式的封禁方法（Bot API 推荐）
public function banChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, $until_date = null, $revoke_messages = null) {
    return $this->apiRequest('banChatMember', $parameters);
}
// kickChatMember 现在内部调用 banChatMember，保持向后兼容
public function kickChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, $until_date = null) {
    return $this->banChatMember($chat_id, $user_id, $until_date);
}
```

**原因：** Telegram Bot API 已将 `kickChatMember` 标记为废弃，官方推荐使用 `banChatMember`，新项目做了这个API升级。

---

#### 3. `bot/blacklist_handler.php` — 新增批量踢出函数（+102行）

新项目新增了一个重要函数 `kickBlacklistedUserFromAllManagedGroups()`，旧项目没有此函数。

该函数的功能是：将一个黑名单用户**从所有已管理的群组中批量踢出**（而不是只踢出某一个群），同时支持连坐逻辑（踢出邀请者）。

**原因：** 功能增强。旧版只能逐个群踢出，新版实现了后台加黑名单后自动全群批量踢出的能力。

---

#### 4. `bot/webhook.php` — 频道订阅验证逻辑重构

这是最复杂的差异，两个版本对**频道订阅验证**功能的实现思路不同：

| 函数/功能 | 新项目 | 旧项目 |
|----------|--------|--------|
| `handleNewMemberVerification()` | 不显示频道订阅按钮 | 显示频道订阅按钮（两步验证）|
| `handleCallbackQuery()` | 有 `verify_channel_` 回调处理逻辑 | 无频道订阅回调处理 |
| `checkChannelSubscription()` 函数 | **不存在**（但代码中有调用，存在 bug）| 存在且完整 |

**原因/分析：** 频道订阅验证功能处于**分两步开发**的中间状态：
- 旧项目：完成了"显示"侧（弹出订阅按钮）但没有"处理"侧（回调无法被响应）
- 新项目：完成了"处理"侧（回调有处理代码）但引用了不存在的 `checkChannelSubscription()` 函数，且没有"显示"侧

两个版本的频道订阅验证功能都**不完整**，说明是一个正在开发中的功能。

---

#### 5. `api/verification.php` — 移除了频道订阅字段（-35行）

新项目的验证设置 API 不再保存 `require_channel`、`required_channel`、`channel_btn_text`、`verify_btn_text` 这四个字段，而旧项目的同名 API 保存了这些字段并调用了 `ensureVerificationColumns($db)` 做兼容处理。

**原因：** 与 webhook.php 中的改动一致，频道订阅功能在新项目中被部分回退或重构。

---

#### 6. `verification.php`（前端页面）— 移除了频道订阅 UI（-107行）

旧项目的验证设置页面包含完整的频道订阅配置表单（频道用户名、按钮文字等），新项目将这些 UI 全部删除。

---

### 总结

| 变更类型 | 文件 | 简述 |
|----------|------|------|
| 配置更换 | `config.php` | 换了新服务器、新Bot账号 |
| API升级 | `bot/TelegramBot.php` | `kickChatMember` → `banChatMember` |
| 功能新增 | `bot/blacklist_handler.php` | 增加全群批量踢出黑名单用户 |
| 功能重构（未完成）| `bot/webhook.php` | 频道订阅验证逻辑调整但有bug |
| 功能回退 | `api/verification.php`、`verification.php` | 频道订阅字段从API和UI中移除 |
| 新增工具脚本 | `force_extract.php` 等4个 | 临时调试和数据迁移工具 |
| 删除旧文件 | `index.html`、`404.html`、`.htaccess` | 旧站静态文件不再需要 |

---

-eq 0 ]; then\n        echo -e \"${GREEN}✓ Composer 安装成功${NC}\"\n    else\n        echo -e \"${RED}错误: Composer 安装失败${NC}\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\nelse\n    echo -e \"${GREEN}✓ Composer 已安装${NC}\"\n    composer --version\nfi\necho \"\"\n\n# 更新 Composer\necho \"正在更新 Composer...\"\ncomposer self-update\ncomposer clear-cache\n\n# 安装 MadelineProto 8.x\necho \"正在安装 MadelineProto 8.x...\"\necho \"这可能需要几分钟，请耐心等待...\"\necho \"\"\n\n# 增加内存限制\nexport COMPOSER_MEMORY_LIMIT=-1\n\n# 安装 8.x 版本\ncomposer require \"danog/madelineproto:^8.0\" --ignore-platform-reqs -vvv\n\nif [ $? -eq 0 ]; then\n    echo \"\"\n    echo -e \"${GREEN}✓ MadelineProto 安装成功！${NC}\"\nelse\n    echo \"\"\n    echo -e \"${RED}错误: MadelineProto 安装失败${NC}\"\n    echo \"请尝试手动安装：\"\n    echo \"composer require danog/madelineproto\"\n    exit 1\nfi\necho \"\"\n\n# 创建 sessions 目录\necho \"正在创建 sessions 目录...\"\nmkdir -p sessions\nchmod 700 sessions\n\n# 创建 .htaccess 保护 sessions 目录\ncat > sessions/.htaccess << 'EOF'\nDeny from all\nEOF\n\n# 创建 index.php 防止目录浏览\ncat > sessions/index.php << 'EOF'\n<?php\n// Silence is golden\nEOF\n\necho -e \"${GREEN}✓ sessions 目录创建成功${NC}\"\necho \"\"\n\n# 创建测试脚本\necho \"正在创建测试脚本...\"\ncat > test_madeline.php << 'EOF'\n<?php\n// 引入 Composer 自动加载\nrequire_once 'vendor/autoload.php';\n\n// 引入 MadelineProto\nuse danog\\MadelineProto\\API;\n\ntry {\n    echo \"========================================\\n\";\n    echo \"MadelineProto 测试\\n\";\n    echo \"========================================\\n\\n\";\n    echo \"MadelineProto 版本: \" . API::RELEASE . \"\\n\";\n    echo \"PHP 版本: \" . ---

## 换服务器时，除 `config.php` 外需要关注的内容

### 结论先说：**其他 PHP 文件不需要修改**

所有涉及 Bot Token、域名、API 凭证的业务文件都通过 `config.php` 中定义的**常量**来读取，不存在其他地方的硬编码。

---

### 详细说明

#### 1. `bot/webhook.php`、`api/user_account.php`、`api/sync_user_groups.php` — 有备用兜底值，但不影响

这三个文件里有这样的写法：

```php
$api_id = defined('TELEGRAM_API_ID') ? TELEGRAM_API_ID : 10488249;
$api_hash = defined('TELEGRAM_API_HASH') ? TELEGRAM_API_HASH : '7abacb2417fb58895b85ed2647e67e2d';
```

这是"如果常量未定义则用备用值"的保险写法。**只要 `config.php` 中 `TELEGRAM_API_ID` 和 `TELEGRAM_API_HASH` 定义正确，这个兜底值永远不会被触发，不需要修改。**

#### 2. `bot/cron.php` — 使用常量，不需要修改

```php
$bot = new TelegramBot(BOT_TOKEN);       // 来自 config.php
$imageUrl = SITE_URL . '/' . ...;        // 来自 config.php
```

全部读取 `config.php` 的常量，换服务器只改 `config.php` 即可。

#### 3. `localhost.sql` — 数据库结构，无硬编码凭证

SQL 文件只有建表结构，`system_settings` 表里**没有预置任何 Bot Token 或 URL 数据**，这些数据是运行时通过后台设置页面写入的。

---

### 换服务器时真正需要操作的清单

| 操作 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| ✅ 修改 `config.php` | 改新服务器的 Bot Token、用户名、新域名、API ID/Hash、数据库连接 |
| ✅ 登录后台重新设置 Webhook | 进入「系统设置」页面，将 `site_url` 改为新域名，然后点击"重新注册 Webhook"，让 Telegram 把消息推送到新地址 |
| ✅ 迁移 `sessions/` 目录 | 如果原来有登录好的真人 Telegram 账号（MadelineProto session 文件），需要把整个 `sessions/` 目录复制到新服务器，否则账号需要重新登录 |
| ✅ 导入数据库 | 把原数据库导出，导入到新服务器数据库 |
| ⚠️ 注意 `uploads/` 目录 | 如有上传的图片等文件，也需要一并迁移 |

最重要的一步是 **Webhook 重新注册**，因为旧的 Webhook URL 指向旧域名，Telegram 不会自动知道你换了服务器。

---

> Now I understand the full picture. The `logout` action only sets `is_logged_in = 0` in the database but does NOT delete the session file. The session files (`user_xxx.madeline` folders) are the actual Telegram login credentials stored by MadelineProto.
>
> The session file name is generated as: `user_` + `md5($phone_number)` + `.madeline`
>
> So:
> - `user_85bff54970cff483a8f9a4ca630408bf.madeline` = md5 of some phone number
> - `user_1524bd3c3b3cd05a50f1386c8bf8f690.madeline` = md5 of another phone number
>
>
> - These are directories containing `callback.ipc` and `ipc` files that store the actual session data.
>
> Deleting these folders would force the accounts to re-authenticate through the UI and invalidate any active MTProto sessions, though the database records would remain.
>
> However, I need to be careful about timing—if MadelineProto is actively using these session files, deleting them mid-operation could cause errors, so I should stop any running processes first. Also, the `logout` action in the code only updates the database flag but doesn't remove the files themselves, so a manual deletion would be a more thorough reset. Let me check what's actually stored in the `user_account_config` table to see what else might need cleaning up.

</details>

## 🤖 Assistant #190 (Agent)

_2026-04-22 10:28:24Z_

可以直接删除，但需要同时处理数据库记录。让我来完整说明：

---

## `sessions/` 下 `user_` 开头的文件夹可以删除吗？

**可以删除**，这就是重置真人账号登录状态的正确方式。

---

### 这些文件夹是什么

当前 `sessions/` 目录下有两个已登录账号的 session 文件夹：

```
sessions/
├── user_85bff54970cff483a8f9a4ca630408bf.madeline/   ← 某个手机号的登录状态
│   ├── callback.ipc
│   └── ipc
├── user_1524bd3c3b3cd05a50f1386c8bf8f690.madeline/   ← 另一个手机号
│   ├── callback.ipc
│   └── ipc
└── madeline.log
```

文件夹名的规律是 `user_` + `md5(手机号)` + `.madeline`，这是 MadelineProto 在文件系统上存储的**真人 Telegram 账号登录凭证**。

---

### 为什么只删文件还不够

看 `api/user_account.php` 中的 `logout` 逻辑：

```php
case 'logout':
    // 只把数据库里的 is_logged_in 改成 0
    $stmt->execute();  // UPDATE user_account_config SET is_logged_in = 0
    // ⚠️ 没有删除 session 文件！
```

代码自带的退出登录**只更新了数据库标志位，并不会删除 session 文件**。所以如果你只是点页面上的退出按钮，`.madeline` 文件夹还留着，下次仍然可以被直接复用。

---

### 完整重置步骤

| 步骤 | 操作 |
|------|------|
| 1 | 删除 `sessions/user_*.madeline/` 文件夹（可以保留 `madeline.log`、`index.php`、`.htaccess`） |
| 2 | 在数据库中清空 `user_account_config` 表的记录（清空 `phone_number`、设 `is_logged_in = 0`、清空 `session_data`） |
| 3 | 之后重新通过后台"真人账号"页面登录即可 |

---

### 注意事项

- 删除文件夹后，该 Telegram 账号在 MadelineProto 这一侧的会话就失效了，但 **Telegram 服务器端的登录状态不受影响**（账号本身不会被退出，只是这个设备/应用的 session 没了）
- 如果当前有后台进程（如 `user_monitor.php` 的守护进程）正在使用这些 session 文件，建议**先停止那些进程再删除**，避免报错

---
